notes: Passive - V9 page modifier. Finds '#links-container', iterates '[data-testid="Link"]' tiles and appends a '.linktree-url-v9' div showing 'Target URL: <url>' for each. After revealing at least one link, adds a '.myosint-v9-badge' attribution badge fixed at bottom-right. Linktree's official 'linktree' profile is a stable public page with multiple links.

checks.comment: Revealed URL text appended to at least one link tile
